common.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this item?
common.imageOptimizationHint: Large photos are compressed with a sharpness guard and never reduced below a 1,800px long edge.

globalSearch.minChars: Type at least 2 characters to search
globalSearch.keyboardHint: Use ↑ ↓ to select and Enter to open detail

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.subtitle: Automatically summarized from follow-up work
notifications.centerSubtitle: Track notification state with read, snooze, and assignment controls

notifications.approvedDisposalsDetail: Actual disposal execution is not recorded yet
notifications.auditActionsDueSoonDetail: Audit follow-up work that must be closed by its due date

notifications.licenseExpiringSoonDetail: Software/licenses that need renewal or review
notifications.deliveredDigestSubtitle: Daily digest notifications the system has delivered, so users can review what was already sent.

myAssets.subtitle: Assets currently assigned to your employee profile.
myAssets.noLinkedEmployeeTitle: This account is not linked to an employee
myAssets.noLinkedEmployeeHelp: Ask an administrator to link your user account to an employee record before personal assets can be shown.
myAssets.emptyTitle: You do not currently hold any assets
myAssets.emptyHelp: If you should hold assets, ask the asset administrator to confirm the handover or custodian transfer.

assetTools.scanSubtitle: Use a phone camera to scan the QR Code on an asset label, or search by Asset Tag, Serial Number, custodian, or location to open asset details quickly
assetTools.scannerHelp: Center only the QR code in the frame, not the whole label, then adjust distance until the QR is sharp. If it looks blurry, hold it slightly farther away. The system fills the value and opens the asset detail automatically.
assetTools.cameraUnsupported: This browser does not support camera access
assetTools.cameraNotFound: No camera found on this device
assetTools.labelsSubtitle: Search and select multiple assets, then print their labels in one batch
assetTools.recentLabelQueueHelp: Assets with no recorded label print yet, useful for clearing a new tagging batch
assetTools.recentLabelQueueEmpty: No assets waiting for label printing
assetTools.importExportSubtitle: Excel tools for downloading the template, validating import files, confirming imports, and exporting asset records
assetTools.downloadTemplateDescription: Download the Excel template with reference data for preparing imports
assetTools.exportAllDescription: Export all asset records available to your current access permissions
assetTools.exportWithFiltersDescription: Return to the asset register to choose filters before exporting

auth.directoryLoginHint: Use a local account or AD/LDAP credentials when directory login is enabled
auth.sessionExpired: Session expired. Please sign in again.

accessDeniedPage.title: You do not have access to this page
accessDeniedPage.description: Your account does not have permission for this menu or action. Contact an administrator if you need access for your work.

dashboard.crossScopePreviewEmpty: No assets are currently outside the owner/tag scope.
dashboard.monthlyTrendSubtitle: Compares this month with the previous month so workload direction is visible.

workCenter.allWorkDetail: Shows all visible follow-up work based on your permissions.
workCenter.myWorkDetail: Shows work related to your employee profile, department, or responsible assets.
workCenter.myWorkUnavailable: This account is not linked to an employee, so My work cannot be scoped yet.
workCenter.missingCustodianDetail: Active assets missing the responsible owner required by ownership type
workCenter.approvalInboxDetail: Central queue across disposal, maintenance, and audit approvals

workCenter.completedMaintenanceDetail: Ready for inspection and ticket closure
workCenter.pendingAuditFindingsDetail: Variances not yet approved or rejected

workCenter.pendingAuditItemsDetail: Audit items still pending in active rounds
workCenter.assetDataSubtitle: Recent assets with important missing data
workCenter.bulkFixSubtitle: Groups common issues so teams can open a filtered register and fix many items faster.
workCenter.dataQuality_responsibilityDetail: Use for assigning custodians, departments, or component ownership by asset type.
workCenter.dataQuality_serialDetail: Use for collecting serial/barcode values for assets that still lack identifiers.
workCenter.dataQuality_photoDetail: Use for collecting real asset evidence photos in batches.
workCenter.approvalInboxSubtitle: Decisions waiting for the current user's approval permissions
workCenter.maintenanceSubtitle: Overdue, externally blocked, or completed tickets waiting to close
workCenter.auditSubtitle: Findings pending review or open action plans
workCenter.disposalSubtitle: Requests pending approval or approved but not completed
workCenter.noAssetDataIssues: No asset register data issues found
workCenter.noApprovalInboxIssues: No approval work waiting for you

asset.title: Asset Register
asset.subtitle: Manage asset records, tags, status, custodians, and current locations
asset.batchCreateSubtitle: Enter shared data once, then fill only row-specific legacy asset tags, serials, custodians, or remarks.
asset.cloneBannerDescription: Shared data from {assetName} has been copied. Asset Tag, Serial Number, and FA/accounting code are left blank for the new asset.
asset.cloneBannerReview: Review custodian, location, purchasing data, and selected documents before saving.
asset.assetNameHelp: Use this as a readable display name. The system can suggest it from category/brand/model; unique identity stays in Asset Tag and Serial Number.
asset.serialScannerHelp: Center only the QR/barcode band in the wide frame. Make the barcode fill most of the frame so the lines are sharp. The value fills this field and can still be edited before saving.
asset.cameraUnsupported: This browser does not support camera access
asset.cameraNotFound: No camera found on this device
asset.duplicateAssetTag: This asset tag is already in use
asset.duplicateSerialNumber: This serial number is already in use
asset.duplicateWarning: Duplicate data found. Please review before saving.
asset.batchAssetTagHelp: Leave blank to auto-generate, or enter the existing number when registering legacy assets.
asset.batchRowHelp: Fill the legacy/custom Asset Tag and Serial per row. Other values use shared data unless you enable row columns.
asset.batchOptionalColumnsHelp: Enable only values that differ from shared data, such as cameras or devices spread across multiple locations.
asset.batchReviewDescription: Review the shared data and row details before creating multiple assets.
asset.batchCheckDuplicatesClean: No duplicate Serial Numbers or Asset Tags found.
asset.batchCheckDuplicatesFound: Duplicate data found. Please review before saving.
asset.batchPasteSerialHint: Paste serials from Excel; rows will be added automatically.
asset.assetOwnerCompanyHelp: Used as the asset owner company and as part of auto-generated Asset Tags.
asset.assetOwnerBranchHelp: Used as the owner branch for Asset Tags and asset locations.
asset.allowCrossCompanyCustodianHelp: Use when the asset belongs to one company but the real custodian is in another company.
asset.crossCompanyCustodianWarning: The selected custodian belongs to a different company than the asset owner. This will be recorded in the audit history.
asset.allowCrossBranchLocationHelp: Use when the tag owner company and branch stay the same, but the real or home location is in another site.
asset.crossBranchLocationWarning: The selected location belongs to a different branch than the owner branch. This will be recorded in the audit history.
asset.ownershipType_personal_help: Use when an asset is assigned to one employee as the accountable holder.
asset.ownershipType_shared_help: Use for shared assets such as CCTV or meeting room equipment, tracked by department and installed location.
asset.ownershipType_stock_help: Use for spare assets kept in stock or by IT before they are issued to a person.
asset.ownershipType_component_help: Use for assets installed as a component of another asset, such as a hard disk inside an NVR.
asset.ownershipType_software_license_help: Use for software, subscriptions, or licenses such as Windows, Microsoft 365, and antivirus, tracked by assignee or responsible department and expiry date.
asset.custodianNotRequiredHelp: This type is tracked by responsible department, current location, and asset relationship instead.
asset.licenseResponsibilityRequired: Select a license assignee or responsible department.
asset.licenseSeatUsageInvalid: Used seats cannot be greater than total seats.
asset.licenseManagementHelp: Track seat count and the assigned device; leave the device blank for a license pool.
asset.statusHelpDescription: Status controls which workflows are available, such as checkout, transfer, repair, disposal, or status correction.
asset.statusHelpReady: Ready: can be used, checked out, transferred, audited, or sent to repair.
asset.statusHelpPendingRepair: Pending Repair: handle through a repair ticket.
asset.statusHelpUnderMaintenance: Under Maintenance: close the job back to Ready or move to Pending Disposal.
asset.statusHelpPendingDisposal: Pending Disposal: do not use or transfer normally; continue through disposal.
asset.statusHelpLostMissing: Lost/Missing: investigate first, then correct back to Ready only when found.
asset.statusHelpUnderInspection: Under Inspection: if damaged, open a repair ticket; if usable, return to Ready through a controlled workflow.
asset.conditionHelpDescription: Condition is the physical state of the asset, not the workflow status. Use it to decide the next action.
asset.conditionHelpGood: Good/usable: the asset can physically be used.
asset.conditionHelpDamaged: Damaged: open a repair ticket, or move toward disposal if repair is not worthwhile.
asset.conditionHelpNeedsReview: Needs review: use when field inspection or audit confirmation is still needed.
asset.conditionHelpMissing: Lost/not found: follow investigation and tracking processes.
asset.protectedStatusEditBlocked: This status must be changed through the related workflow.
asset.protectedStatusEditHelp: If the asset is damaged, open a repair ticket. The system will move it to Pending Repair and record the history automatically.
asset.protectedStatusCorrectionHelp: This asset is in a controlled lifecycle status. Use status correction from the asset detail page if it was selected by mistake.
asset.customFieldsStructuredHelp: Add extra details as a name and value, such as CPU, RAM, color, size, or license. The system saves them as JSON automatically.
asset.customFieldsJsonHelp: For admins who need to edit raw JSON directly. It must be an object, such as {"cpu":"Intel i7"}.
asset.customFieldsJsonInvalid: Additional data JSON must be a valid object.
asset.customFieldsNoTemplate: This category does not have an asset detail template yet.
asset.customFieldsSelectCategory: Select a category to show its asset detail template.
asset.photoGalleryPreviewHelp: Shows the most important photos first. Click a photo to view it larger.
asset.initialAssetPhotosHelp: Capture or attach checklist photos during receiving, such as asset tag, serial number, or condition. Photos are saved after the asset is created.
asset.photoChecklistSelectCategory: Select a category first to show the required photo checklist.
asset.photoChecklistEmptyForCategory: This category has no photo checklist yet. You can still attach general photos.
asset.dropAssetPhotoTitle: Take a photo or drop an asset photo here
asset.dropAssetPhotoHint: or click to choose from this device
asset.autoPhotoLabelHint: If you do not choose one, it will be saved as: {label}
asset.dropFileTitle: Drag and drop a file here
asset.dropFileHint: or click to choose a file
asset.purchaseDocumentsHelp: Select an existing shared purchase document or create a new one for multiple assets, such as one PO/Invoice for 100 computers.
asset.purchaseDocumentNoRequired: Please enter the purchase document number
asset.purchaseDocumentLinkFailed: Could not link purchase document to asset
asset.bulkUpdateDescription: Choose a new location or custodian. The system records movement history for every selected asset.
asset.importWizardHelp: Download the template, prepare the file, upload it for validation, then confirm import after all blocking errors are fixed.
asset.importIssueSummaryHelp: Fix the most common issues first to get the file ready faster.
asset.importMappingHelp: The system reads file headers and maps them to import fields before validation.
asset.importBatchHelp: The preview creates a batch number and reuses it in audit logs after import approval.
asset.importHistoryHelp: Shows recent import approvals from the Audit Trail with import counts and rollback-plan visibility.
asset.quickFiltersHelp: Open common register views while keeping the current search, company, branch, and category context.
asset.advancedFiltersHelp: Status, condition, ownership type, and row count
asset.tableScrollHint: Scroll left/right to see more columns. Asset tag, name, and actions stay pinned.
asset.printLabelPreview: Preview a QR label for physical asset tagging
asset.printLabelsPreview: Format QR codes and asset tags for batch label printing
asset.labelPrintRecordFailed: Unable to record the label print request. Please try again.
asset.labelPrinterTapeGuidance: Before printing, open Brother Printer Properties and set Tape Size = {tapeSize} to match the tape loaded in the printer.
asset.labelQrLocalWarning: This QR still points to localhost/an internal network or does not have a full domain. Set Public QR Base URL in System Settings > Label / QR to the permanent system domain and save before printing production labels.
asset.noEvidenceHelp: No supporting files from asset photos, purchase documents, repairs, audits, or disposal records yet.
asset.activitySummaryHelp: A short operational snapshot before reading every section
asset.quickActionsHelp: Jump to common workflows for this asset
asset.quickActionsSoftwareHelp: Software/license workflows focus on assignment, renewal, and entitlement tracking.
asset.quickActionsStockHelp: Stock workflows focus on issuing from stock or moving storage location.
asset.quickActionsSharedHelp: Shared asset workflows focus on installed location and responsible department.
asset.quickActionsComponentHelp: Component workflows focus on parent asset relationship and install/remove history.
asset.statusCorrectionDescription: Use this only to correct an accidental lifecycle status. The reason is saved to the movement timeline and audit log.
asset.statusCorrectionReasonPlaceholder: Example: Disposal was executed by mistake; asset is still in service.
asset.lifecyclePersonalDescription: Use handover/return to track individual custody, and transfer when location or department changes.
asset.lifecycleSoftwareDescription: Use license assignment, seat tracking, assigned device, and expiry instead of physical asset handover.
asset.lifecycleStockDescription: Use issue-from-stock when the item is deployed, and move stock when its storage location changes.
asset.lifecycleSharedDescription: Use relocation and responsible department as the primary workflow. Handover is only for temporary loans.
asset.lifecycleComponentDescription: Use parent asset relationship, install/remove history, and component movements as the primary workflow.
asset.relationshipMapHelp: See whether this asset is a parent asset or installed as a component elsewhere
asset.relationshipLicenseAssignedAsset: Device/asset this license is assigned to
asset.relationshipSummaryParent: This item is a parent asset • {count} installed components
asset.relationshipSummaryComponent: This item is installed as a component • under {parent}
asset.relationshipSummaryParentAndComponent: This item is a component and has child components • under {parent} • {count} components
asset.relationshipSummaryStandalone: This item has no component relationship yet
asset.relationshipNoParentHelp: This item is not installed as a component of another asset.
asset.relationshipNoComponentsHelp: This item does not have child components installed under it yet.
asset.relationshipNote: Note: This relationship shows the current structural data and may change after movement, transfer, or data updates.
asset.maintenanceReplacementWarning: This asset has frequent repairs or high accumulated repair cost. Consider repair continuation versus disposal/replacement.
asset.noMaintenanceHelp: If this asset starts having issues, you can open a repair ticket directly from here.
asset.noAuditHelp: Add this asset to an audit round to capture its latest location, custodian, and condition evidence.

detailSections.overviewSubtitle: Identity, status, and core asset information
detailSections.ownershipSubtitle: Company, branch, department, custodian, and current location
detailSections.specsSubtitle: Reusable model and technical details for this asset type
detailSections.purchaseSubtitle: Purchase, warranty, and linked PO/Invoice documents
detailSections.evidenceSubtitle: Collects attachments and evidence photos from register, purchase documents, handover/return, maintenance, audit, and disposal
detailSections.handoverSubtitle: Documents, photo evidence, and signatures for handover and return transactions
detailSections.movementSubtitle: One timeline for movements, handovers, purchase documents, components, repairs, and audit events
detailSections.maintenanceSubtitle: Recent repair tickets related to this asset
detailSections.auditSubtitle: Audit rounds, scan results, and scan counts for this asset
detailSections.notesSubtitle: Additional remarks saved with this asset

asset.componentSearchPlaceholder: Search Asset Tag, name, Serial Number, or accounting code
asset.componentSearchHelp: Type part of the tag or name. The system shows assets that are not currently installed as components.
asset.componentSummaryHelp: Review installed components, install/remove history, photo evidence, and parent asset relationships
asset.componentGuardNote: The API prevents duplicate installation, self-installation, duplicate slots, and parent-child cycles.
asset.componentEvidenceHelp: Take or choose an image, such as the serial number or installation position
asset.componentEvidenceSelected: File selected. It will be saved with the record.
asset.installAfterCreateHelp: Use this when a newly created asset should be installed into a parent asset immediately, such as a new hard disk in an NVR or computer.
asset.installAfterCreateComponentHelp: Component assets must choose a parent asset so audit and history know where the part is installed.
asset.componentParentRequired: Select a parent asset for component ownership type.
asset.componentRoleRequired: Please enter the component role / type
asset.installAfterCreateFailed: Asset was created, but installing it as a component failed

company.title: Companies
company.subtitle: Manage company records used by branches, employees, and assets
company.codeHelp: Used to identify the company and map AD/LDAP data.
company.assetTagCodeHelp: Used only for generated asset tags. Leave blank to fall back to the company code above.
company.searchPlaceholder: Search company code, asset tag code, name, tax id, or address
company.summaryWithoutAssetsHelp: Review whether these are new companies or old data.
company.summaryWithoutBranchesHelp: Add branches before creating real asset records.

branch.summaryWithoutAssetsHelp: Review whether these are new branches or old data.
branch.summaryWithoutLocationsHelp: Add locations before putting assets into service.

employee.subtitle: Manage employees and asset custodians with company, branch, and department ownership
employee.searchPlaceholder: Search code, name, email, position, company, branch, department, or manager
employee.summaryWithoutAssetsHelp: Useful for validating imported employee records.
employee.summaryFormerWithAssetsHelp: Review returns or transfers for inactive employees.
employee.detailProfileHelp: Organization and status data used by assets, maintenance, and audits.
employee.detailCurrentAssetsSectionHelp: Showing {shown}/{total} records linked to this custodian.
employee.viewAllAssets: View all assets for this employee
employee.emptyCurrentAssetsHelp: If this employee should hold assets, record a handover or update the custodian on the asset.
employee.handoverHistoryHelp: Answers what was handed over, by whom, and when it was returned.
employee.emptyHandoverHelp: Handover and return records will appear here once recorded.
employee.maintenanceRelatedHelp: Repair tickets where this employee is reporter, owner, or inspector.
employee.emptyMaintenanceHelp: Tickets will appear here when this employee reports, owns, or inspects repair work.
employee.followUpHelp: Issues worth clearing before closing work or trusting this employee record.
employee.followUpEmptyHelp: The employee status and related records look clear for now.

former_employee_with_assets.title: Former employee still holds assets
former_employee_with_assets.help: Return or transfer these assets before closing this person record.

open_checkout_returns.title: Open handovers are not returned
open_checkout_returns.help: Review handover documents and expected return dates so assets do not remain with the wrong custodian.

open_maintenance.title: Open maintenance remains
open_maintenance.help: Follow related repair tickets through closure.

pending_audit_findings.title: Audit findings need follow-up
pending_audit_findings.help: Review action plans or review status so asset data becomes accurate again.

pending_disposals.title: Disposal requests are still open
pending_disposals.help: Review requests waiting for approval or actual execution.

employee.auditRelatedHelp: Findings, audit items, and rounds linked to this custodian.
employee.emptyAuditFindings: No findings assigned to this employee
employee.emptyAuditRounds: No audit rounds scoped to this employee
employee.disposalRelatedHelp: Requests where this employee is requester, approver, or executor.

location.title: Locations
location.subtitle: Manage physical asset locations with hierarchy support for buildings, floors, rooms, zones, and racks

location.summaryWithoutAssetsHelp: Review whether these are standby locations or old data.
location.summaryLeafHelp: Best candidates for actual install or storage points.
location.summaryRootHelp: Top-level entries in the location hierarchy.

category.title: Asset Categories
category.subtitle: Group asset types for tags, models, and additional fields
category.name: Category Name
category.searchPlaceholder: Search category code, name, or description
category.summaryMissingModelsHelp: Add models before bulk asset creation or imports.
category.summaryMissingChecklistHelp: Affects receiving and audit evidence completeness.
category.summaryMissingPrefixHelp: Keeps asset tags readable by asset type.
category.categoryToolsHelp: Export category setup for review or download a starter file for category data preparation.
category.customFieldTemplateHelp: Define fields that appear automatically on the asset form when this category is selected.
category.fieldOptions: Options, one per line or comma-separated
category.photoChecklistTemplateHelp: Define recommended shots for receiving or auditing assets, such as front view, serial number, or asset tag placement.
category.photoChecklistEmpty: No photo checklist for this category yet

brandModel.title: Brands / Models
brandModel.subtitle: Manage asset brands and models, with each model tied to a category and brand
brandModel.modelsSubtitle: Models capture specifications and connect categories to brands before asset registration
brandModel.structuredSpecsHelp: Split specifications into labels and values so the model is easier to read and reuse across assets.
brandModel.specsEmpty: No specs yet. Apply suggested fields or add your own.
brandModel.modelPhotoHelp: Use a shared model photo to help users recognize the general appearance before checking asset-specific photos.
brandModel.dropModelPhotoTitle: Drag and drop a model photo here
brandModel.dropModelPhotoHint: or click to choose an image
brandModel.saveModelBeforePhoto: Save the model before uploading its photo.
brandModel.brandNavigatorSubtitle: Select a brand to filter the model workspace.
brandModel.modelWorkspaceSubtitle: Search and filter models across every brand.
brandModel.brandModelToolsHelp: Export for review or download a template to prepare brand/model batches.
brandModel.searchPlaceholder: Search brand, model, specs, or category
brandModel.duplicateReviewSubtitle: The system normalizes spaces and punctuation to catch names that may refer to the same record, such as HP, H P, and H-P.
brandModel.brandListSubtitle: Paginated list with a shortcut to view models for each brand.

supplier.title: Suppliers
supplier.subtitle: Manage vendor records used for purchasing history and asset registration

supplier.searchPlaceholder: Search tax ID, supplier code, name, contact, phone, email, or address
supplier.summaryAssetLinkedHelp: Open suppliers linked to active assets.
supplier.summaryWithoutAssetsHelp: May be standby vendors or starter data.
supplier.summaryWithoutPurchaseDocumentsHelp: Review when centralized purchase documents are in use.
supplier.purchaseDocumentsHelp: Central purchase documents linked to this supplier
supplier.noFollowUp: No important follow-up items right now
supplier.followUpMissingContact: This supplier has no contact person, phone, or email yet.
supplier.followUpAssetsWithoutPurchaseDocuments: Assets reference this supplier, but no central purchase documents are linked yet.
supplier.followUpOpenMaintenance: There are vendor repair jobs that are not closed yet.
supplier.linkedAssetsTitle: Assets Bought From / Referencing This Supplier
supplier.noAssetsHelp: Assets will appear here when this supplier is selected on the asset record.
supplier.noPurchaseDocumentsHelp: PO, invoice, delivery, or warranty documents linked to this supplier will appear here.
supplier.noMaintenanceHelp: Repair jobs that use this supplier as the vendor will appear here.

checkout.title: Check-out Asset
checkout.photoBeforeDropTitle: Take or drop a before-handover photo
checkout.photoBeforeDropHint: Tap to use a mobile camera, or click/drop an image file
checkout.photoBeforeSelected: Photo selected. It will be saved with the checkout.
checkout.receiverSignatureHelp: Ask the receiver to sign in this box. The system saves it as handover evidence automatically.

checkin.title: Check-in Asset
checkin.noActiveCheckoutsTitle: No checked-out assets are waiting for return
checkin.noActiveCheckoutsDescription: This page only shows assets that have been checked out and have not been checked in yet.
checkin.legacyReturnDescription: Use this for imported or backfilled records that already have a current custodian but no open checkout. The system creates an auditable backfilled checkout before continuing through the normal return form.
checkin.legacyReturnEmpty: No assets currently match the legacy return criteria
checkin.legacyReturnFailed: Could not create the backfilled checkout
checkin.legacyReturnSearch: Search asset tag, asset name, holder, or location
checkin.legacyReturnNoResults: No legacy assets match this search
checkin.selectReturnAndReceiver: Please select both returned by and received by
checkin.selectCheckoutRequired: Please select the active checkout to return
checkin.completeRequiredFields: Please complete the required fields: condition after, next status, and storage location
checkin.photoAfterDropTitle: Take or drop an after-return photo
checkin.photoAfterDropHint: Tap to use a mobile camera, or click/drop an image file
checkin.photoAfterSelected: Photo selected. It will be saved with the check-in.
checkin.returnPhotoChecklistHelp: Capture multiple angles. The system saves them as return evidence and labels each photo by type.
checkin.returnSignatureHelp: Ask the returner to sign here as asset return evidence.
checkin.receiveSignatureHelp: Ask the receiver to sign here to confirm the asset was received back.
checkin.createMaintenanceHelp: Use this when the returned asset is damaged or marked Pending Repair. A maintenance ticket will be created immediately.
checkin.createMaintenanceDisabledHelp: Select Pending Repair as the next status before creating a maintenance ticket automatically.
checkin.maintenanceProblemPlaceholder: Optional. If blank, the system uses damage/missing accessory details from this return.

transfer.title: Transfer Asset
transfer.destinationRequired: Choose at least one transfer destination

auditRound.title: Audit Rounds
auditRound.subtitle: Create and track audit rounds with generated expected asset lists by scope
auditRound.createSuccess: Audit round created with {count} expected assets
auditRound.name: Audit Name
auditRound.includeClosedAssetsHelp: By default, All assets excludes Disposed and Retired statuses. Enable this only for accounting closeout or historical evidence audits.
auditRound.riskSamplingHelp: Combine this with the scope below to generate audit rounds from assets that need attention first, and reduce item count when the scope is large.
auditRound.sampleRateHelp: 100 = audit every matched asset, 20 = stable sample of about 20% by asset ID.
auditRound.previewTitle: Preview before creating the audit round
auditRound.previewHelp: Check matched assets and sampled item count before saving the real audit round.
auditRound.resultDashboardHelp: Overview of matched assets, mismatches, not-found items, and records still waiting for review.
auditRound.closeChecklistHelp: The round can be closed only when no assets are pending, no findings are waiting for review, and no action plans remain open.
auditRound.closeSeparateApprover: Closer must be different from creator
auditRound.evidenceSummaryHelp: Counts asset photos uploaded after the audit round started and compares them with the category photo checklist.
auditRound.emptyAssetsTitle: No expected assets in this round
auditRound.emptyAssetsHelp: Go back and create a new audit round or adjust the scope before starting the audit.
auditRound.nextActionsHelp: Start with rounds that still need scanning, review mismatches next, then close rounds that are ready.
auditRound.actionContinueScanHelp: Assets still pending in open audit rounds
auditRound.actionReviewFindingsHelp: Findings or action plans that still need a decision
auditRound.actionCloseReadyRoundsHelp: No pending assets or open findings remain
auditRound.coverageHelp: Compares active assets with assets included in this year's audit rounds so uncovered scope is visible before the next round.
auditRound.coverageGapHelp: Sorted by the largest count of assets not yet included in an audit round.

auditScan.title: Audit Scan
auditScan.assetPickerHelp: Use when the camera cannot read, or search the pending queue.
auditScan.assetPickerSearch: Search Asset Tag, name, location, custodian
auditScan.scanInputPlaceholder: Paste URL, Asset ID, or Asset Tag
auditScan.scanInputHelp: Scan QR or paste an Asset Tag.
auditScan.manualSuggestionHelp: Choose from the list below. Partial text will not auto-select an item.
auditScan.manualSuggestionPickOne: Multiple items match. Choose one from the search results.
auditScan.scanEntryHelp: Pull the item from this round without scrolling.
auditScan.cameraUnsupported: This browser or device does not support web camera access
auditScan.cameraNotFound: No camera was found on this device
auditScan.cameraHelp: If the camera does not appear, check browser camera permission or use the URL/Asset Tag input above
auditScan.torchUnsupported: This device does not support browser flashlight control
auditScan.assetNotInRound: This asset is not in the audit round
auditScan.unknownAsset: This asset was not found in the system
auditScan.continuousScanHelp: Keep this on while walking the floor.
auditScan.feedbackUnknownAssetDescription: Decoded value: {code}. If this is a real asset, verify the Asset Tag or register it first.
auditScan.feedbackOutOfScopeTitle: Out of scope: asset exists outside this round
auditScan.fastModeHelp: Designed for mobile field audits: scan, choose data matched or data mismatch, and open details only when something differs.
auditScan.fastModeCompactHelp: Scan and choose the result immediately.
auditScan.quickFieldModeHelp: If the data matches the system record, save it as matched. If not, edit the actual data before saving.
auditScan.outOfScopeFound: Asset found outside this audit scope
auditScan.outOfScopeHelp: Record this item to create a finding for review so the owner can decide whether to add it, transfer it, or update master data.
auditScan.pendingQueuePanelHelp: Select an item to review expected data, or open the full list to mark not found.
auditScan.currentTargetHelp: Review the system data before choosing the audit result.
auditScan.systemDataHelp: Use this data to choose whether the scan matches or does not match.
auditScan.auditDecisionHelp: If the field data matches the system record, save it as matched. If not, open a finding and edit the actual data found.
auditScan.actualDataHelp: Change only the fields that differ. The system compares them with system data and creates findings automatically.
auditScan.matchedPreview: Actual data matches the expected record
auditScan.foundSuccess: Audit scan saved: found and matched
auditScan.mismatchSuccess: Audit scan saved and findings were created for review
auditScan.foundAfterNotFoundSuccess: Audit scan saved and the previous not-found finding was closed
auditScan.correctionAppliedSuccess: Audit scan saved and the asset location/custodian was updated
auditScan.applyAuditCorrections: Update location/custodian to the actual finding
auditScan.applyAuditCorrectionsHelp: Use this when the auditor confirms the asset is truly at this location or with this custodian. The system creates an approved finding and movement log automatically.
auditScan.auditPhotoEvidenceHelp: Capture free-form field evidence. Photos are saved with the asset and audit result.
auditScan.auditPhotoOptionalForMatch: Photos are optional when the data matches, and you can add multiple photos if needed.
auditScan.auditPhotoRequiredForMismatch: When the data does not match, add at least 1 photo. You can add multiple photos for field evidence.
auditScan.auditPhotoTagHint: Tags only group photos. You can add multiple photos.
auditScan.autoAuditPhotoLabelHint: If you do not choose one, it will be saved as: {label}
auditScan.dropAuditPhotoTitle: Take or attach multiple evidence photos
auditScan.dropAuditPhotoHint: Click to take/select one photo at a time, or drop multiple photos
auditScan.dropAuditPhotoSelected: Added as evidence. You can add more photos.
auditScan.offlineQueueHelp: These results were stored on this device after a failed submission. Retry when the connection is back.
auditScan.offlineQueueOfflineHelp: This device is offline. The queue stays on this device and can be retried when the connection returns.
auditScan.offlineQueueFailedHelp: {count} queued results failed to sync. Review the latest error and retry when ready.
auditScan.offlineQueued: Audit scan saved to the offline queue
auditScan.offlineQueuedWithoutPhotos: Audit scan saved to the offline queue, but queued photos cannot be preserved after a page reload.
auditScan.offlineQueuedWithPhotos: Audit scan and photos saved to the offline queue

auditFinding.title: Audit Findings
auditFinding.subtitle: Review, approve, or reject findings before updating master asset data
auditFinding.emptyHelp: Return to audit rounds to keep scanning, or change the status filter above.
auditFinding.resolutionHelp: Track audit findings from review through action closure using the existing workflow and data.
auditFinding.freshnessStaleTitle: This page has been open for a while
auditFinding.freshnessStaleHelp: Refresh before approving or closing work to avoid acting on stale data.
auditFinding.summaryPendingReviewHelp: Needs an approve or reject decision
auditFinding.summaryOpenActionsHelp: Has an action plan or closure evidence pending
auditFinding.summaryOverdueHelp: Open action plan is past its due date
auditFinding.quickFiltersHelp: Switch work queues without leaving the page. Exports use the same filter.
auditFinding.dropClosureEvidenceTitle: Take a photo or attach closure evidence
auditFinding.dropClosureEvidenceHint: or click to choose an image/PDF
auditFinding.batchReviewHelp: Select pending findings on this page, then approve or reject them together.
auditFinding.segregationReviewBlocked: You cannot review a finding that you reported
auditFinding.reviewDecisionHelp_approve: The system will use the found value to update the master asset record when this finding type supports automatic correction, and will record an asset movement for traceability.
auditFinding.reviewDecisionHelp_reject: The system will keep this finding as rejected and will not update the master asset record.
auditFinding.reviewConflictTitle: Asset data changed after this finding was created
auditFinding.reviewConflictHelp: The master asset record was updated after this finding was reported. Refresh to review the latest data, or confirm if you have checked and still need to continue.
auditFinding.approvedSuccess: Finding approved and asset data updated

auditPending.title: Pending Assets
auditPending.notFoundSuccess: Not Found saved and a pending finding was created

reportsPage.title: Reports
reportsPage.subtitle: Asset summaries and basic operational reports
reportsPage.costInsightHelp: Summarizes cost exposure from purchase prices and accumulated repair costs under the current filters.
reportsPage.costNoRepairRisk: No repair costs under the current filters
reportsPage.accountingInsightHelp: Estimates straight-line depreciation from purchase price, purchase date, and the accounting policy in System Settings to support an initial book-value view.
reportsPage.accountingNoAssets: No assets have both purchase price and purchase date under the current filters.
reportsPage.crossScopeHelp: Find assets whose owner company or owner branch does not match the actual custodian or location. Use this to clean up responsibility and installation scope.
reportsPage.crossScopeEmpty: No cross-scope assets match the current filters.
reportsPage.reportCatalogHelp: Reports grouped by real workflows, with shortcuts to view pages and export files.
reportsPage.catalogAssetDescription: Core reports for asset lists, values, and breakdowns by category or organization.
reportsPage.catalogDataQualityDescription: Track incomplete register data such as custodian, serial, photos, and expiring warranties.
reportsPage.catalogDataQualityAudience: For register owners and data reviewers
reportsPage.catalogMaintenanceDescription: Track repair tickets, workflow status, costs, and work that needs closure.
reportsPage.catalogAuditDescription: Summarize audit variances, pending reviews, and auditor-facing exports.
reportsPage.catalogAuditAudience: For audit teams and variance approvers
reportsPage.catalogDisposalDescription: Track disposal requests, approval status, and completed disposal execution.
reportsPage.catalogSystemDescription: Review user permissions, risky roles, and system activity history.
reportsPage.catalogSystemAudience: For system administrators and internal auditors
reportsPage.filterHelp: These filters affect summary metrics, grouped tables, and asset register/overview exports.
reportsPage.searchPlaceholder: Asset Tag, Serial, asset name, custodian...
reportsPage.previewHelp: Shows the latest matching records so users can confirm the dataset before exporting.
reportsPage.previewEmpty: No records match the current filters
reportsPage.dataQualityActionHelp: Shows recent assets with incomplete key data under the current report filters.
reportsPage.dataQualityEmpty: No records need fixing under the current filters
reportsPage.operationInsightsHelp: Summarizes real asset usage by custodian, location, repair frequency, and inactive movement.
reportsPage.idleAssetsHelp: No movement during the latest 180 days under the current filters
reportsPage.savedReportsHelp: Prepare commonly reused report sets and export them immediately for routine work.
reportsPage.currentFilterPresetHelp: Reopen this page with the same filters. Useful for bookmarks or sharing within the team.
reportsPage.permissionHelp: Export buttons are shown only for reports this account can access.

maintenancePage.title: Maintenance
maintenancePage.subtitle: Open repair tickets, track repair work, and keep asset maintenance history
maintenancePage.viewTicketsHelp: Open repair work, track SLA, and close daily repair tickets
maintenancePage.viewPmHelp: Create and track recurring preventive maintenance plans
maintenancePage.createSubtitle: Select an asset, describe the problem, reporter, and initial owner
maintenancePage.searchPlaceholder: Search repair no., asset, problem, reporter, or vendor
maintenancePage.resultCount: Showing latest {count} records for the current filters
maintenancePage.emptyTitle: No repair tickets match the filters
maintenancePage.emptyHelp: Clear the filters or open a new repair ticket from the form above.
maintenancePage.overdueWarning: This repair is overdue. Follow up or revise the due date.
maintenancePage.pmSubtitle: Track recurring PM work for critical assets before it becomes urgent repair work.
maintenancePage.pmEmptyHelp: Add PM plans for assets that need recurring checks, such as UPS, printers, CCTV, or other critical equipment.
maintenancePage.kanbanSubtitle: Shows latest filtered tickets by workflow stage
maintenancePage.dropFileTitle: Drag and drop a file here
maintenancePage.dropFileHint: or click to choose a file
maintenancePage.emptyHistoryTitle: No movements for this repair ticket yet
maintenancePage.emptyHistoryHelp: Status updates, closure, or asset return events will appear here.
maintenancePage.closeChecklistEvidence: After-repair photo or evidence is attached

disposalPage.title: Disposal
disposalPage.subtitle: Create disposal, sale, donation, destruction, or lost asset requests
disposalPage.createSubtitle: Select an asset, reason, requester, approver, and related values
disposalPage.searchPlaceholder: Search request no., asset tag, asset name, requester, or reason
disposalPage.resultCount: Showing latest {count} records for the current filters
disposalPage.emptyTitle: No disposal requests match the filters
disposalPage.emptyHelp: Clear the filters or create a disposal request from the form above.
disposalPage.approveKeepsPendingDisposal: Approval keeps the asset in its current status until the actual disposal execution is recorded.
disposalPage.emptyHistoryTitle: No movements for this request yet
disposalPage.emptyHistoryHelp: Approval and actual disposal execution events will appear here.
disposalPage.dropEvidenceTitle: Take an asset photo or attach disposal evidence
disposalPage.dropEvidenceHint: or click to choose an image/PDF

approvalInboxPage.title: Approval Inbox
approvalInboxPage.subtitle: Central queue for disposal, maintenance, and audit decisions that need approval
approvalInboxPage.policyDescription: Uses System Settings > approval policy and filters the queue by the current user's permissions
approvalInboxPage.approverMatrixDescription: Checks that each workflow has at least {min} active approver users according to the central policy.
approvalInboxPage.noApprovers: No active users hold this permission
approvalInboxPage.queueDescription: Open a record to approve or close it in its workflow detail page
approvalInboxPage.emptyDescription: Pending disposal requests, findings to review, repair closures, and audit rounds ready to close will appear here.
approvalInboxPage.emptyFilterDescription: Choose another category or return to all items.

approvalHistoryPage.title: Approval Decision History
approvalHistoryPage.subtitle: Review who approved, rejected, closed, or executed each workflow item with before and after detail.
approvalHistoryPage.filterDescription: Filter by workflow type or decision result.
approvalHistoryPage.timelineDescription: Latest Audit Trail entries related to workflow approval decisions.
approvalHistoryPage.emptyDescription: Approvals, rejections, maintenance closures, and audit round closures will appear here.

productionReadinessPage.title: Production Readiness
productionReadinessPage.subtitle: Check the critical settings before go-live to reduce risk from broken printed QR codes, missing approvers, or incomplete baseline data.
productionReadinessPage.checklistDescription: These checks read real system settings, users/roles, and master data instead of relying on a manual checklist.
productionReadinessPage.scopeDescription: Focused on go-live risks: QR/labels, workflow approval, notification rules, admin users, and minimum master data.
productionReadinessPage.check_publicQrBaseUrl_description: Use a stable HTTPS domain such as https://asset.company.com before printing real QR labels.
productionReadinessPage.check_workflowApprovers_description: Checks that each workflow has at least the configured minimum approvers and none are missing.
productionReadinessPage.check_notificationRules_description: Checks return, audit action, warranty, and software/license notification windows are valid 0-365 day values.
productionReadinessPage.check_adminCoverage_description: Keep at least two active system admin accounts to avoid lockout if the primary account fails.
productionReadinessPage.check_masterData_description: Checks minimum company, branch, department, location, category, status, and condition data exists.
productionReadinessPage.check_appBaseUrl_description: Checks AUTH_URL/NEXTAUTH_URL use the same HTTPS domain without a production port in the URL.
productionReadinessPage.check_authSecret_description: Checks AUTH_SECRET/NEXTAUTH_SECRET are set, match, and are not placeholder values.
productionReadinessPage.check_uploadDir_description: Checks UPLOAD_DIR is a stable absolute path for attachments and asset photos.
productionReadinessPage.check_databaseConfig_description: Checks DB_SERVER, DB_USER, DB_PASSWORD, and DATABASE_URL are configured and not placeholders.
productionReadinessPage.check_schedulerTokens_description: Checks PM auto-generation, LDAP Sync, and notification digest tokens are configured before using the systemd timer.
productionReadinessPage.check_uploadScanner_description: Checks whether the optional server-side upload scanner command is configured with a valid timeout.
productionReadinessPage.check_schedulerRuns_description: Checks the latest PM, LDAP sync, and notification digest scheduler results.
productionReadinessPage.check_backupStatus_description: Checks the latest backup status from environment values before go-live.
productionReadinessPage.check_backupRestoreDrill_description: Checks that a backup restore test has been recorded through BACKUP_LAST_RESTORE_TEST_AT.
productionReadinessPage.check_retentionPolicy_description: Checks attachment, Audit Trail, and orphan-file retention days are valid 1-3650 day values.
productionReadinessPage.check_pwaAssets_description: Checks manifest, icons, service worker, and offline fallback files before users install the app on mobile.

storagePage.title: File Storage
storagePage.subtitle: Review attachment storage by module and flag records that should be checked before any real file deletion or migration.
storagePage.reviewNeededHelp: Duplicate paths, missing paths, missing files, or files outside DB
storagePage.filesystemDryRunHelp: Scans UPLOAD_DIR and compares it with DB records without moving or deleting real files.
storagePage.archiveConfirm: Move {file} to .archive? This does not delete the file.
storagePage.moduleBreakdownHelp: Shows where stored files are concentrated.
storagePage.reviewListHelp: No automatic deletion. Review duplicate or missing paths first.
storagePage.emptyReview: No records need review right now
storagePage.largestFilesHelp: Use this to identify storage-heavy files that may need archiving.

adminUsersPage.title: User Management
adminUsersPage.subtitle: Review user accounts, roles, status, and recent sign-in activity
adminUsersPage.formSubtitle: Configure sign-in account, linked employee, status, and assigned roles

adminRolesPage.title: Roles & Permissions
adminRolesPage.subtitle: Review user roles and access permissions for each module
adminRolesPage.createSubtitle: Configure role metadata and select permissions
adminRolesPage.formSubtitle: Select the module/action permissions available to this role
adminRolesPage.metadataSubtitle: Edit the role display names, description, and status
adminRolesPage.systemRoleCountDetail: Core roles that control primary permission structure
adminRolesPage.highRiskRoleCountDetail: Has at least one delete, approve, or export permission
adminRolesPage.inactiveRoleWithUsersDetail: Review and move users away from these roles
adminRolesPage.permissionMatrixSubtitle: Each cell shows roles assigned to that module/action permission
adminRolesPage.permissionLockedSubtitle: System Administrator permissions are locked to protect core system access
adminRolesPage.systemRoleGuard: System roles cannot change their role key or active status, but display names, description, and permissions can be edited
adminRolesPage.systemAdminGuard: System Administrator is protected from role key, status, or permission changes to preserve core system access

dataQualityPage.title: Data Quality Rule Center
dataQualityPage.subtitle: Configure asset register data-quality rules and review issue counts for enabled checks.

missingCustodian.label: Responsible owner required
missingCustodian.description: Find assets missing a custodian, responsible department, or parent asset required by ownership type.

missingSerial.label: Serial Number required
missingSerial.description: Find assets missing a Serial Number for unique identification.

missingPhoto.label: Asset photo required
missingPhoto.description: Find assets without register photo evidence.

missingDepartment.label: Department required
missingDepartment.description: Find assets not linked to a department.

missingPurchaseInfo.label: Purchase information required
missingPurchaseInfo.description: Find assets missing purchase date, price, supplier, PO, or invoice.

warrantyExpiring.label: Warranty expiring
warrantyExpiring.description: Find assets whose warranty expires within 30 days.

systemSettingsPage.title: System Settings
systemSettingsPage.subtitle: Manage baseline system values such as asset numbering, company name, and currency
systemSettingsPage.settingsOverviewDescription: Key settings that affect asset numbers, documents, labels, and LDAP connectivity.
systemSettingsPage.changeReviewDescription: Shows the previous and new values for changed settings so admins can check impact before saving.
systemSettingsPage.advancedWarningTitle: Advanced settings affect the whole system
systemSettingsPage.advancedWarningDescription: Only edit these keys when the impact is understood because some values affect document numbers, login, or sync behavior.
systemSettingsPage.assetTagFormatDescription: Define the asset tag sequence with tokens. '{assetCompanyCode}' uses the company's Asset Tag Code, separate from the company/LDAP code.
systemSettingsPage.assetTagTemplateHelp: Template must include '{running}'. Running number length is controlled by asset_tag_running_digits, for example 4.
systemSettingsPage.presetCompanyPrefixMonthRunning: Asset tag company code + asset prefix + month + running
systemSettingsPage.presetCompanyBranchPrefixRunning: Asset tag company code + branch + asset prefix + running
systemSettingsPage.presetGlobalPrefixYearRunning: Global prefix + asset prefix + year + running
systemSettingsPage.invalidFormatTemplate: Template must include '{running}' and only use supported tokens
systemSettingsPage.labelPrintTemplateDescription: Configure tape size and text lines for QR Code + Asset Tag printing
systemSettingsPage.publicQrBaseUrlDescription: Stable base URL embedded into printed label QR codes, such as https://asset.company.com. The system appends /q/a/{assetId}.
systemSettingsPage.invalidLabelTemplate: The print template uses unsupported tokens
systemSettingsPage.invalidLabelSize: Label size must be supported: width 30-120 mm, height 10-100 mm, QR 20-90 px, and margin/gap 0-10 mm
systemSettingsPage.invalidPublicQrBaseUrl: Public QR Base URL must be a valid http or https URL
systemSettingsPage.operationDocumentNumbersDescription: Configure readable handover and return document numbers while UUIDs remain internal record identifiers.
systemSettingsPage.operationDocumentTemplateHelp: Template must include '{running}'. To use YYYYMM-0001, set the template to '{yyyyMM}-{running}'.
systemSettingsPage.invalidOperationDocumentTemplate: Document templates must include '{running}', only use supported tokens, and running digits must be between 1-12
systemSettingsPage.categoryPrefixesDescription: Assign category-specific prefixes such as IT = COM or Furniture = FUR. New asset tags use this prefix instead of the category code.
systemSettingsPage.noCategoryPrefixes: No category-specific prefixes yet. The system will use category codes instead.
systemSettingsPage.searchCategories: Search by category code or name...
systemSettingsPage.duplicateCategory: Each category can only be mapped once
systemSettingsPage.invalidPrefix: Prefix must be 2-10 A-Z letters or numbers
systemSettingsPage.organizationDefaultsDescription: Baseline values used for display and reports.
systemSettingsPage.accountingDepreciationPolicyDescription: JSON policy with defaultUsefulLifeMonths, defaultResidualRate, and rules matched by ownership type, category code, or category name. Example: License 36 months, Computer 60 months, residualRate 0.1 = 10% residual value.
systemSettingsPage.invalidAccountingDepreciationPolicy: Depreciation policy must be valid JSON, useful life must be 1-600 months, and residualRate must be between 0-0.9.
systemSettingsPage.depreciationPolicyBuilderDescription: Set useful life and residual value by category while preserving the existing JSON policy setting.
systemSettingsPage.depreciationNoGroups: No category-specific groups yet. The default policy applies to every category.
systemSettingsPage.depreciationAssignedCategoryConflict: This category is already assigned to another group.
systemSettingsPage.depreciationLegacyRulesHelp: These rules are preserved and still work through text matching, but should be moved into category groups after review.
systemSettingsPage.depreciationPreviewDescription: This preview uses purchase date as the depreciation start date.
systemSettingsPage.depreciationAdvancedJsonDescription: Use this for technical inspection or support edits. Invalid JSON blocks saving.
systemSettingsPage.notificationRulesDescription: Configure the look-ahead days used by follow-up summaries and admin notifications.
systemSettingsPage.notificationDaysHelp: Use 0 to notify only items due today or already overdue. Maximum is 365 days.
systemSettingsPage.invalidNotificationRule: Notification rule days must be an integer between 0-365
systemSettingsPage.workflowApprovalPolicyDescription: Choose which workflows require approval and enforce separation between requesters and approvers.
systemSettingsPage.workflowApprovalAuditCloseRequired: Audit round closure requires a separate approver
systemSettingsPage.workflowApprovalMinApproversHelp: Allowed range is 1-5 approvers. This is the shared baseline for future approval workflows.
systemSettingsPage.workflowApprovalSlaDaysHelp: Approval Inbox items older than this many days are marked overdue and sorted first.
systemSettingsPage.workflowApprovalFoundationNote: These settings are the shared approval policy foundation. Audit Segregation of Duties is already enforced, and other workflows can gradually read the same policy.
systemSettingsPage.invalidWorkflowApproval: Approval toggles must be true/false, minimum approvers must be 1-5, and SLA days must be 1-90
systemSettingsPage.schedulerSettingsDescription: Configure the database-backed schedules used by backend automation jobs. The systemd timer only wakes the shared heartbeat.
systemSettingsPage.schedulerHeartbeatNote: Use this page as the source of truth for timing. Cron schedules are interpreted in Asia/Bangkok time. In production, the systemd timer should run every 5 minutes and let the app decide whether PM generation or LDAP Sync is due.
systemSettingsPage.invalidSchedulerSchedule: Automation schedules must be supported five-field cron expressions, such as 5 6 * * * or 0 */6 * * *.
systemSettingsPage.pmAutoGenerationDescription: Creates maintenance tickets from due PM plans, prevents duplicate open tickets, and advances the next due date after successful generation.
systemSettingsPage.pmAutoGenerationOffDescription: Do not generate PM tickets automatically. PM plans remain available for tracking.
systemSettingsPage.pmAutoGenerationManualDescription: Users generate tickets from the PM plan page when they are ready.
systemSettingsPage.pmAutoGenerationScheduledDescription: The system generates PM tickets from due plans on the configured schedule.
systemSettingsPage.governanceSettingsDescription: Collects settings that affect evidence files, Audit Trail retention, and storage review so admins do not need to hunt through Advanced settings.
systemSettingsPage.retentionPolicyDescription: Defines the day thresholds used before archive/delete review in Storage Governance. The system does not delete files automatically from these values alone.
systemSettingsPage.retentionDaysHelp: Each value must be an integer from 1-3650 days. Align these values with company document policy and review a Storage Governance dry-run before real action.
systemSettingsPage.invalidRetentionPolicy: Retention days must be whole numbers from 1-3650.
systemSettingsPage.ldapSettingsDescription: Configure directory login. Values saved here always take precedence over .env; .env is only a startup fallback when the database has no setting yet.
systemSettingsPage.ldapDefaultRoleHelp: This role is assigned to first-time LDAP-created users after the system matches an active Employee by LDAP email or employeeID.
systemSettingsPage.ldapDefaultRoleMissing: Role “{role}” is not active or does not exist. Select a valid role before enabling auto-provision.
systemSettingsPage.ldapSyncStrategyDescription: Prepare safe controls for syncing employee and user records from LDAP.
systemSettingsPage.ldapSyncDefaultMappingDescription: The sync uses employeeID as the employee code, the company attribute as Company, the first OU in distinguishedName as Department, and the next OU as Branch; the defaults below are fallback values when mapping is not found.
systemSettingsPage.ldapSyncDeactivateImpactTitle: Impact from employees missing in AD
systemSettingsPage.ldapSyncDeactivateImpactDescription: When applied, these employees and linked app user accounts will be deactivated. Their assets remain linked so return or transfer can be handled with evidence.
systemSettingsPage.ldapSyncNoDeactivateImpact: No active assets or active user accounts are linked to these employees.
systemSettingsPage.ldapSyncNoPreview: No preview yet. Run Preview Sync before writing data.
systemSettingsPage.ldapSyncRecommendation: Start with Preview mode to review create/update/deactivate counts, then use Manual Sync, and only enable Scheduled Sync after Company/Branch/Department mapping is ready.
systemSettingsPage.ldapSyncHistoryDescription: Review recent Manual/Scheduled LDAP Sync runs from the Audit Trail without remembering module/action filters.
systemSettingsPage.ldapSyncHistoryEmpty: No recorded LDAP Sync history yet.
systemSettingsPage.advancedSettingsDescription: Additional settings without a dedicated editor. Change only when needed.

integrationApiPage.title: Integration API Clients
integrationApiPage.subtitle: Create and manage database-backed API clients for approved read-only integrations.
integrationApiPage.emptyDescription: Create a client to issue a one-time token for an approved integration.
integrationApiPage.tokenPanelWarning: This plain token is shown only once. Copy it to the approved secret manager before closing this panel.
integrationApiPage.tokenAcknowledgement: I have copied this token and understand it cannot be shown again.
integrationApiPage.confirmRotate: Rotate this client token? The current token will stop working after rotation.
integrationApiPage.confirmScopeExpansion: You are adding permissions to an existing token. It will be able to call the newly allowed endpoint immediately. Continue?
integrationApiPage.confirmDisable: Disable this API client? Requests using its token will stop working.
